descriptionZh: 粉粒物料连续定量供给设备，处理能力13.6-198.9 m³/h。采用变频调速圆盘结构，确保物料精确计量输送。圆盘直径2000-3000mm，适用于化工、建材、食品等行业干燥粉状物料。
descriptionEn: Continuous quantitative powder material feeding equipment with 13.6-198.9 m³/h capacity. Features frequency-controlled adjustable disc structure for precise material metering. Disc diameter 2000-3000mm, suitable for dry powders in chemical, building materials, and food industries.

content.zh: 可按照客户需求进行定制
content.en: Can be customized according to customer requirements

features.descriptionZh: 变频控制系统调速范围0.5-4.5 r/min，给料精度±2%
features.descriptionEn: Frequency conversion control system with 0.5-4.5 r/min speed range, feeding accuracy of ±2%

features.descriptionZh: 关键传动部件采用耐磨合金，MTBF超过5000小时
features.descriptionEn: Key transmission components made of wear-resistant alloy, MTBF exceeding 5000 hours

features.descriptionZh: 主要零部件少于20个，维护点少，操作直观简便
features.descriptionEn: Less than 20 main components, few maintenance points, intuitive and simple operation

features.descriptionZh: 专利圆盘设计防止物料架桥，确保细粉物料流畅输送
features.descriptionEn: Patented disc design prevents material bridging, ensuring smooth fine powder transportation

features.descriptionZh: 适合0-10mm细粉物料，处理温度范围-10℃至80℃
features.descriptionEn: Suitable for 0-10mm fine materials with processing temperature range from -10°C to 80°C

description.zh: 精确添加催化剂、染料、颜料等化工原料。变频调速系统实现0.5-4.5 r/min无级调速，确保配方精度，满足GMP生产标准。
description.en: Precisely adds catalysts, dyes, pigments and other chemical raw materials. Variable frequency drive achieves 0.5-4.5 r/min stepless speed regulation, ensuring formula accuracy and meeting GMP production standards.

description.zh: 用于水泥、石膏等建材生产的原料添加。耐磨圆盘设计使用寿命长，封闭结构减少粉尘扩散，最大直径3000mm适合大产能需求。
description.en: Used for raw material addition in cement and gypsum production. Wear-resistant disc design offers long service life, sealed structure reduces dust diffusion, maximum diameter of 3000mm suitable for high capacity requirements.

description.zh: 输送谷物、豆类、调味料等食品原料。304不锈钢材质符合食品级要求，表面抛光处理Ra≤0.8μm，快拆结构便于清洁消毒。
description.en: Conveys grains, beans, seasonings and other food ingredients. 304 stainless steel meets food-grade requirements with surface polishing treatment Ra≤0.8μm, quick-disassembly structure facilitates cleaning and disinfection.

description.zh: 添加污水处理和废气净化用助凝剂、活性炭等。调速精度高达±2%，确保处理剂用量精确控制，降低处理成本，提高环保效率。
description.en: Adds flocculants, activated carbon for wastewater and exhaust gas treatment. Speed regulation accuracy up to ±2% ensures precise control of treatment agent dosage, reducing treatment costs and improving environmental efficiency.
